allow: PowerShell(if \(Test-Path _site/index.html\) { Get-ChildItem _site -Depth 2 -Directory | ForEach-Object { Write-Output $_.FullName } } else { Write-Output "_site not found" })

PowerShell($response = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://esfog.github.io" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 15; $response.Content | Out-File -Encoding utf8 .temp-site.html; Write-Output "File saved, $\(\($response.Content.Length\)\) chars")

PowerShell(# Delete all old post images; Remove-Item -Recurse -Force public/media; Write-Output "Deleted public/media/"; # Delete duplicate avatars; Remove-Item public/avatar.gif -Force; Remove-Item public/avatar.jpg -Force; Remove-Item public/media/avatar.jpg -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Output "Deleted duplicate avatars"; # Show what remains; Write-Output "`nRemaining files in public/:"; Get-ChildItem public -Recurse | ForEach-Object { Write-Output "  $\($_.FullName.Replace\("$pwd\\", ''\)\)" })
